app.name: Family Genealogy Management
app.description: Preserve your family trees, members, relationships, events, and media.

login.visualText: Preserve memories, connect relatives, and pass your family history on to generations to come.
login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your family journey.
login.verified: Your email is verified. You can now sign in.
login.invalidToken: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

errors.invalid: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.locked: Your account is locked for 15 minutes after 5 failed sign-in attempts.
errors.unverified: Please verify your email before signing in.
errors.generic: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.

register.visualTitle: Preserve what makes your family unique.
register.visualText: Create a private place for the people, stories, and milestones that matter.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start building your family's secure genealogy.
register.name: Full name
register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
register.successVerification: Your account is ready. Check your email and verify it before signing in.
register.successReady: Your account is ready. You can sign in now.

errors.invalid: Please check your details and password strength.
errors.generic: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again.
